zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Anthony Aucher於1500年出生在英國肯特奧特爾登 普拉斯時，他的父親James Aucher30歲，母親Alice Hill22歲。他於大約1525年7月20日與Affra Cornwallis在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1558年1月9日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特比曉普斯布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Anthony Aucher于1500年出生在英国肯特奧特爾登 普拉斯时，他的父亲James Aucher30岁，母亲Alice Hill22岁。他于大约1525年7月20日与Affra Cornwallis在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1558年1月9日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特比曉普斯布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Aucher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: South German: occupational name for someone who watched cattle at night, from Middle High German uhte ‘night watch, night pasture’, or ‘time just before dawn’. Compare Auch .
Scottish: topographic name from Gaelic uachdar ‘upland, summit’, or a habitational name from a place in Perthshire named with this word.

variants.name: Auch
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Egon, Hermann, Otto.

South German (mainly Stuttgart): metonymic occupational name for someone who minded cattle at night, from Middle High German uhte ‘night watch, night pasture’, or ‘time just before dawn’. Compare Auchter .

nameMeanings.name: Anthony
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual English form of the old Roman family name Antonius, which is of uncertain (probably Etruscan) origin. The spelling with -th- (not normally reflected in the pronunciation) represents a learned but erroneous attempt to associate it with Greek anthos ‘flower’. In the post-classical period it was a common name, borne by various early saints, most notably a 3rd-century Egyptian hermit monk, who is regarded as the founder of Christian monasticism.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Anthony Aucher was born in 1500, in Otterden Place, Kent, England, his father, James Aucher, was 30 and his mother, Alice Hill, was 22. He married Affra Cornwallis about 20 July 1525, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 January 1558, in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 58, and was buried in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Anthony Aucher est né en 1500, à Otterden Place, Kent, Angleterre, son père, James Aucher, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Alice Hill, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Affra Cornwallis environ 20 juillet 1525, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 janvier 1558, à Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Bishopsbourne, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Anthony Aucher 1500 in Otterden Place, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James Aucher 30 und seine Mutter Alice Hill 22. Er hat um 20. Juli 1525 in England Affra Cornwallis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. Januar 1558 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Bishopsbourne, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anthony Aucher è nato il nel 1500 nel Otterden Place, Kent, England, il suo padre, James Aucher, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Alice Hill, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Affra Cornwallis circa 20 luglio 1525, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 gennaio 1558, nel Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Anthony Aucherが1500年にイギリスケントオッテルデン プレイスで生まれた時，父James Aucherは30歳，母Alice Hillは22歳であった。約1525年7月20日にイギリスでAffra Cornwallisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1558年1月9日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントビショプスボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Anthony Aucher(이)가 1500년 영국 켄트 오터든 플레이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James Aucher(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Hill(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1525년 7월 20일 영국에서 Affra Cornwallis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1558년 1월 9일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 비숍스번에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Anthony Aucher nasceu em 1500, em Otterden Place, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, James Aucher, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Alice Hill, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Affra Cornwallis aproximadamente 20 de julho de 1525, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de janeiro de 1558, em Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Anthony Aucher родился в 1500 г. в местности оттирден плеис, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени James Aucher было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Hill, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Affra Cornwallis около 20 июля 1525 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 января 1558 г. в местности пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности бишопсбурн, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Anthony Aucher nació en 1500, en Otterden Place, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, James Aucher, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Alice Hill, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Affra Cornwallis aproximadamente 20 de julio de 1525, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de enero de 1558, en Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Bishopsbourne, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
